updates.tweet_text:
Evening traders gifted with yet another long in #ES_F, just like Sunday. Same drill daily. Per newsletter, recoveries of the 7490 2 day shelf were actionable. We got it last evening, went +37

Plan today: Ride runner until vol expands. 7522, 7532, 7548 next set. 7490=support https://t.co/02HqiWQHKX
updates.notes: 7522 is the only unlisted price, but it appears in a directional target list referencing the newsletter/morning plan context, not introduced with naming language as a standalone new level.

updates.tweet_text: Volatility has died out again in #ES_F and everyone knows the drill now. Sit in runner, do nothing until the next bear trap. Per newsletter recovery of the 7490 shelf triggered long last evening. Targets are now 7522, 7532, 7548, then onto 7575 which still needs to backtest https://t.co/2xS5UC1Sx4
updates.notes: 7522 is named as an explicit upside target not in the morning plan. 7532, 7548, 7575 are morning-plan reaffirmations.

updates.tweet_text: @kevinc2114 Double bottomed it exact. Could still take the long there sometimes price does that (it did it last week also). Double bottoms the low exact but doesn't get that one tick extra needed for a Failed Breakdown
updates.notes: Reply explaining price action (double bottom, failed breakdown) — no new actionable price named, pure observation/commentary.

updates.tweet_text: Finally unpinning from the morning chop in #ES_F mildly and little to do now but ride runner until next bear trap. 7490 shelf recovery was last entry. Today's targets were 7522 (hit), 7532 (hit), 7548 next, then 7575 which has to backtest still and has been unable to so far https://t.co/TpSv7f6CV1
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7490, 7522, 7532, 7548, 7575) are morning-plan levels or hit-target observations; no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: One way traffic in #ES_F and summer trading usually gives an entry, then trends up for 1-3 days with nothing to do but ride runner. 7490 reclaim was last entry. Targets given at 8am were fourfold: 7522 (hit), 7532 (hit), 7548 (almost), then the big 7575 backtest. Decision point https://t.co/zxvbCrPMJQ

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: No volatility. 4 targets were given for today. 7522 (hit), 7532 (hit), 7548 (hit). We've been stuck at this 7548 level now for over 2 hours and ES clearly likes it. 7575 is next. Then we head to 7627. Newsletter out shortly talking the next entries from here
